string.text:
A Long barreled, marksman version of the FN FNC with a PSG stock and a pistol grip adjusted for long ranged combat. It's modified with a Picatinny rail for collimators and sights. Made for precision, it has a slower fire rate, but hits harder than the average FNC. It includes a muzzle break and a set of 20 rounds magazines.
 This Marksman modification was first found on an ISG member.

 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Scopes: ACOG, Leupold
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Silencer: NATO 5.56x45 Suppressor

A compact, lighter version of the FN FNC with a foldable skeleton stock and a short barrel used by paratroopers. It's modified with a Picatinny rail for collimators and sights. It has a faster fire rate than the average FNC, ideal for CQC.
 This pre-ban version of the weapon found its way into the Zone through the illegal arms trading line between Mercenaries and ISG.

 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Scopes: EoTech, ACOG, AC10632
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Silencer: NATO 5.56x45 Suppressor
